---
title: "WaterBasedRec_AGU"
author: "Isaac T. Sanchez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(devEMF)
library(emmeans)
library(forcats)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(Hmisc)
library(kableExtra)
library(lme4)
library(lubridate)
library(officer)
library(patchwork)
library(purrr)
library(readxl)
library(rlang)
library(rsvg)
library(readr)
library(sandwich)
library(svglite)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(zoo)
library(showtext)

Boaters <- readxl::read_excel ("Data//State Parks day use and boating.xlsx", sheet =2)
Day_Users <- readxl::read_excel("Data//State Parks day use and boating.xlsx", sheet = 1)
Waterfowl_Hunters <- readxl::read_excel("Data//Waterfowl Hunters.xlsx", sheet = 1)
Audubon_Oct_Mar <- readxl::read_excel("Data//Audubon Oct Mar.xlsx", sheet = 1)
Seasonal_Hydrology = readxl::read_excel("Data//Seasonal Weighted Hydrology_Final.xlsx", sheet = 2)

```

## Data Clean up, trimmed but overwhelmingly left resembling orignal excel sheets for best practices, thus requiring lots of clean-up

```{r data clean up}


# Set hydrology class order
cond_levels_summer <- c("Critical", "Dry", "Below Normal", "Above Normal", "Wet")
cond_levels_winter <- c("Critical", "Dry", "Below Normal", "Above Normal", "Wet")
# Boaters clean
# Excel file used: Boat Users.xlsx
# Columns pulled:
# - Park Name
# - BoatsL
# - Month/Year
# - Weighted Apr-Jul discharge class
# Parse boat counts as numeric, trim date text, and standardize hydrology labels.
boaters_clean <- Boaters %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Park_Name = `Park Name`,
    Boats = `Boats`,
    MonthYear = `Month/Year`,
    Condition = `Weighted Summer discharge class`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Boats = suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(as.character(Boats))),
    MonthYear = stringr::str_trim(MonthYear),
    Condition = factor(
      stringr::str_squish(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(Condition))),
      levels = cond_levels_summer,
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )


# Day users clean
# Excel file used: Day Users.xlsx
# Columns pulled:
# - Park Name
# - Non-boaters
# - Month/Year
# - Weighted Apr-Jul discharge class
day_users_clean <- Day_Users %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Park_Name = `Park Name`,
    Non_boaters = `Non-boaters`,
    MonthYear = `Month/Year`,
    Condition = `Weighted Summer discharge class`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Non_boaters = suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(as.character(Non_boaters))),
    MonthYear = stringr::str_trim(MonthYear),
    Condition = factor(
      stringr::str_squish(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(Condition))),
      levels = cond_levels_summer,
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )


# Waterfowl hunters clean
# Excel file used: Waterfowl Hunters.xlsx
# Columns pulled:
# - Date
# - Waterfowl
# - Unit
# - Weighted Oct-Mar discharge class
# Convert count text to a numeric hunting count.
# Treat FLOODED or CLOSED entries as closed-unit zeros.
# Treat blank, dash, and NA-like entries as missing counts.
waterfowl_clean <- Waterfowl_Hunters %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Date,
    Waterfowl,
    Unit,
    Condition = `Weighted Winter discharge class`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Waterfowl_raw = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Waterfowl)),
    Closed = dplyr::if_else(
      stringr::str_detect(
        Waterfowl_raw,
        stringr::regex("FLOODED|CLOSED", ignore_case = TRUE)
      ),
      1L,
      0L
    ),
    NoCount = dplyr::if_else(
      Waterfowl_raw %in% c("-", "", "NA", "N/A"),
      1L,
      0L
    ),
    Waterfowl_num = suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(Waterfowl_raw)),
    Waterfowl = dplyr::case_when(
      Closed == 1L ~ 0,
      NoCount == 1L ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ Waterfowl_num
    ),
    Unit = stringr::str_squish(Unit),
    Condition = factor(
      stringr::str_squish(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(Condition))),
      levels = cond_levels_winter,
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )


# Audubon birds clean
# Excel file used: Audubon Oct Mar.xlsx
# Columns pulled:
# - COMMON_NAME
# - SCIENTIFIC_NAME
# - COUNTY
# - LOCALITY
# - OBSERVATION_DATE
# - WaterYearDate
# - Weighted Oct-Mar discharge class
# Keep only the columns needed to map localities into birding sites,
# assign hydrology class, and count observations by site and date.
audubon_clean <- Audubon_Oct_Mar %>%
  dplyr::select(
    OBJECTID,
    COMMON_NAME,
    SCIENTIFIC_NAME,
    COUNTY,
    LOCALITY,
    OBSERVATION_DATE,
    WaterYearDate,
    Condition = `Unimpaired Weighted Hydrology`
  )


# Birding site mapping <--Very Important step, as location data were not cropped via shapefile, we chose by text match.
# Restrict birding to the four focal sites used in the analysis.
# Map free-text LOCALITY values into one common site name.

priority_sites <- c("Yolo Bypass", "Woodbridge", "Sherman Island", "Cosumnes")

audubon_sites <- audubon_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(LOCALITY, stringr::regex("yolo", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Yolo Bypass",
      stringr::str_detect(LOCALITY, stringr::regex("woodbridge", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Woodbridge",
      stringr::str_detect(LOCALITY, stringr::regex("sherman", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Sherman Island",
      stringr::str_detect(LOCALITY, stringr::regex("cosumnes", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Cosumnes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Site %in% priority_sites)


# Birding observation counts
# Count one row per observation record.
# Then summarize to daily observation totals by site and hydrology class.

audubon_counts <- audubon_sites %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Condition = factor(
      stringr::str_squish(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(Condition))),
      levels = cond_levels_winter,
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    Site,
    OBSERVATION_DATE,
    Condition
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Observations = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year = lubridate::year(OBSERVATION_DATE)
  )


# Verify
# Check that hydrology levels are standardized before modeling.
check_levels <- function(data, name) {
  cat("\n", name, "\n", sep = "")
  print(levels(data$Condition))
  print(table(data$Condition, useNA = "ifany"))
  invisible(data)
}

check_levels(boaters_clean, "boaters_clean")
check_levels(day_users_clean, "day_users_clean")
check_levels(waterfowl_clean, "waterfowl_clean")
check_levels(audubon_counts, "audubon_counts")

```

```{r Parameters & Data Clean}


# Set shared hydrology levels
# Use one common level order for the combined activity table.
# Winter activities do not always contain all five classes in the raw data,
# but we still carry the full set here for consistency downstream.
COND_LEVELS <- c("Critical", "Dry", "Below Normal", "Above Normal", "Wet")
SEASON_LEVELS <- c("Summer", "Winter")

# Standardize site and park names
# Recode alternate names into one shared naming scheme so that
# locations match across figures, models, and output tables.
name_map <- c(
  "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area" = "Yolo Bypass",
  "Yolo Bypass" = "Yolo Bypass",
  "Woodbridge Ecological Reserve" = "Woodbridge",
  "Sherman Isl." = "Sherman Island",
  "Cosumnes River Preserve" = "Cosumnes",
  "Grizzly Island WA" = "Grizzly Island",
  "GIWA" = "Grizzly Island",
  "Twitchell Island" = "Twitchell",
  "Yolo" = "Yolo"
)

harmonize_names <- function(x) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  dplyr::recode(y, !!!name_map, .default = y) |> factor()
}

# Parse Month/Year values
# Convert mixed Month/Year formats into Date values.
# This handles:
# - text dates 
# - numeric month/year formats
# - year-month formats
# - Excel serial dates
# - blanks and dash placeholders
parse_monthyear <- function(x) {
  x <- stringr::str_squish(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "-", "NA", "N/A")] <- NA_character_
  out <- as.Date(rep(NA_character_, length(x)))

  num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  is_serial <- !is.na(num) & num > 20000 & num < 80000
  out[is_serial] <- as.Date(num[is_serial], origin = "1899-12-30")

  idx <- which(!is_serial & !is.na(x))
  if (length(idx)) {
    ym <- suppressWarnings(
      zoo::as.yearmon(
        x[idx],
        tryFormats = c(
          "%b %Y", "%B %Y", "%b-%Y", "%B-%Y", "%b/%Y", "%B/%Y",
          "%m/%Y", "%m-%Y", "%Y-%m", "%Y/%m", "%Y %b", "%Y %B",
          "%Y%b", "%Y%B"
        )
      )
    )
    out[idx] <- as.Date(ym, frac = 0)

    need <- idx[is.na(ym)]
    if (length(need)) {
      dt <- suppressWarnings(
        lubridate::parse_date_time(
          x[need],
          orders = c("ymd", "Ymd", "mdy", "dmy", "Y-m-d", "Y/m/d", "m/d/Y", "d/m/Y")
        )
      )
      out[need] <- as.Date(dt)
    }
  }

  out
}

# One long table per activity
# Convert each cleaned source table into the same six analysis fields:
# Activity, Season, Location, Date, Value, and Condition.
# Waterfowl also keeps Closed because it is used later in modeling.
#------------------------------
# Boaters:
# - Location comes from Park_Name
# - Date comes from MonthYear
# - Value comes from Boats
boaters_long_p <- boaters_clean %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Activity = "Boaters",
    Season = "Summer",
    Location = harmonize_names(stringr::str_squish(Park_Name)),
    Date = parse_monthyear(MonthYear),
    Value = as.numeric(Boats),
    Condition = factor(as.character(Condition), levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = FALSE)
  )

# Day users:
# - Location comes from Park_Name
# - Date comes from MonthYear
# - Value comes from Non_boaters
day_users_long_p <- day_users_clean %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Activity = "Day Users",
    Season = "Summer",
    Location = harmonize_names(stringr::str_squish(Park_Name)),
    Date = parse_monthyear(MonthYear),
    Value = as.numeric(Non_boaters),
    Condition = factor(as.character(Condition), levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = FALSE)
  )

# Waterfowl hunters:
# - Location comes from Unit
# - Date comes from Date
# - Value comes from Waterfowl
# - "Closed" is kept
hunters_long_p <- waterfowl_clean %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Activity = "Waterfowl Hunters",
    Season = "Winter",
    Location = harmonize_names(stringr::str_squish(Unit)),
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Value = as.numeric(Waterfowl),
    Closed = Closed,
    Condition = factor(as.character(Condition), levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = FALSE)
  )

# Birders:
# - Location comes from Site
# - Date comes from OBSERVATION_DATE
# - Value comes from Observations
birders_long_p <- audubon_counts %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Activity = "Birders",
    Season = "Winter",
    Location = harmonize_names(stringr::str_squish(Site)),
    Date = as.Date(OBSERVATION_DATE),
    Value = as.numeric(Observations),
    Condition = factor(as.character(Condition), levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = FALSE)
  )


# Bind activities into one analysis table
all_activities2_p_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  boaters_long_p,
  day_users_long_p,
  hunters_long_p,
  birders_long_p
)

all_activities2_p <- all_activities2_p_raw %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(Value),
    !is.na(Location),
    !is.na(Date),
    !is.na(Condition)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = factor(Activity),
    Season = factor(Season, levels = SEASON_LEVELS),
    Location = factor(Location)
  )


# Checks
# Check how many parsed dates were missing in the summer datasets.
# Then count rows by activity and hydrology class after filtering.
tibble::tibble(
  boat_na_dates = sum(is.na(boaters_long_p$Date)),
  day_na_dates = sum(is.na(day_users_long_p$Date))
)

all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::count(Activity, Condition)
```

```{r Building up}


# Standardize activity values
# Start from the combined activity table built in the prior chunk.
# Create a standardized value within each Activity x Location group.
# This puts activities on a comparable z-score scale for later figures.

all_activities2_p_norm <- all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Activity, Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Value_norm = if (
      stats::sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE) == 0 ||
      is.na(stats::sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE))
    ) {
      0
    } else {
      (Value - mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE)) / stats::sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


# Quick checks
# Confirm row counts after filtering in the prior chunk.
# Then count rows by activity and hydrology class.

tibble::tibble(
  n_after = nrow(all_activities2_p)
)

all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::count(Activity, Condition) %>%
  tidyr::complete(Activity, Condition, fill = list(n = 0))
```

```{r EMMs + BH}


# Model and EMM settings
# Use Below Normal as the reference class for baseline percent comparisons.
# Use HC3 robust standard errors.
# Use equal weights for marginal means across hydrology classes.

BASELINE <- "Below Normal"
EMM_WEIGHTS_GLOBAL <- "equal"
ROBUST_SE <- TRUE
HC_TYPE <- "HC3"


# PSD-safe robust covariance
# HC covariance matrices can occasionally return a small negative variance issue
# If that happens, push the matrix to the nearest positive semidefinite version

vcovHC_psd <- function(mod, type = "HC3") {
  vc <- sandwich::vcovHC(mod, type = type)
  vc <- as.matrix(vc)
  vc <- (vc + t(vc)) / 2

  ev <- tryCatch(
    eigen(vc, symmetric = TRUE, only.values = TRUE)$values,
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )

  if (any(!is.finite(ev)) || any(ev < -1e-8)) {
    if (requireNamespace("Matrix", quietly = TRUE)) {
      vc <- as.matrix(Matrix::nearPD(vc, corr = FALSE)$mat)
    }
  }

  vc
}


# Robust emmeans wrapper
# Compute EMMs with HC3 robust SEs when ROBUST_SE is turned on.

safe_emm <- function(model, specs, weights = EMM_WEIGHTS_GLOBAL, at = list()) {
  if (ROBUST_SE) {
    vc <- vcovHC_psd(model, type = HC_TYPE)
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs, weights = weights, at = at, vcov. = vc)
  } else {
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs, weights = weights, at = at)
  }
}


# Quick level checks
# Confirm that the cleaned activity tables carry the expected hydrology labels.
check_levels <- function(df, name) {
  raw <- sort(unique(as.character(df$Condition)))
  cat("\n---", name, "---\n")
  print(raw)
  cat("Not in COND_LEVELS:\n")
  print(setdiff(raw, COND_LEVELS))
  cat("In COND_LEVELS but absent in data:\n")
  print(setdiff(COND_LEVELS, raw))
}

check_levels(boaters_clean, "boaters_clean")
check_levels(day_users_clean, "day_users_clean")
check_levels(waterfowl_clean, "waterfowl_clean")
check_levels(audubon_counts, "audubon_counts")


# Relevel conditions for modeling
# Keep a modeling copy of each cleaned table with Condition aligned to COND_LEVELS.

boaters_clean2 <- boaters_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS))

day_users_clean2 <- day_users_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS))

waterfowl_clean2 <- waterfowl_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS))

audubon_counts2 <- audubon_counts %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS))


# Fit activity-specific models
# Boaters:
#   response = Boats
#   fixed effects = Condition + Park_Name
#
# Day users:
#   response = Non_boaters
#   fixed effects = Condition + Park_Name
#
# Waterfowl hunters:
#   response = Waterfowl
#   fixed effects = Condition + Closed + Unit
#
# Birders:
#   response = Observations
#   fixed effects = Condition + Site
m_boat <- stats::lm(
  Boats ~ Condition + factor(Park_Name),
  data = boaters_clean2
)

m_day <- stats::lm(
  Non_boaters ~ Condition + factor(Park_Name),
  data = day_users_clean2
)

m_wf <- stats::lm(
  Waterfowl ~ Condition + Closed + factor(Unit),
  data = waterfowl_clean2
)

m_bird <- stats::lm(
  Observations ~ Condition + factor(Site),
  data = audubon_counts2
)


# Estimated marginal means by condition
# For waterfowl, hold Closed = 0 when computing condition EMMs.

emm_boat <- safe_emm(m_boat, ~ Condition)
emm_day <- safe_emm(m_day, ~ Condition)
emm_wf <- safe_emm(m_wf, ~ Condition, at = list(Closed = 0))
emm_bird <- safe_emm(m_bird, ~ Condition)


# Tidy EMM output
# Build 95% intervals for figures and 99% intervals for export tables.
# Standardize the condition column name because broom output can vary by version.
standardize_condition_col <- function(df) {
  nm <- names(df)

  if ("Condition" %in% nm) {
    df
  } else if ("term" %in% nm) {
    dplyr::rename(df, Condition = term)
  } else if ("level" %in% nm) {
    dplyr::rename(df, Condition = level)
  } else if ("contrast" %in% nm) {
    dplyr::rename(df, Condition = contrast)
  } else {
    stop(
      "Can't find a Condition column in tidy(emmeans) output. Columns are: ",
      paste(nm, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
}

emm_all_95 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  broom::tidy(emm_boat, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Boaters"),
  broom::tidy(emm_day, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Day Users"),
  broom::tidy(emm_wf, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Waterfowl Hunters"),
  broom::tidy(emm_bird, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Birders")
) %>%
  standardize_condition_col() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
  )

emm_all_99 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  broom::tidy(emm_boat, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.99) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Boaters"),
  broom::tidy(emm_day, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.99) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Day Users"),
  broom::tidy(emm_wf, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.99) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Waterfowl Hunters"),
  broom::tidy(emm_bird, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.99) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Birders")
) %>%
  standardize_condition_col() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
  )

# Keep 95% output for figure-ready summaries.
# Keep 99% output for export tables.
emm_all <- emm_all_95
emm_all_tbl99 <- emm_all_99


# Percent change vs baseline
# Convert EMMs into percent difference from the Below Normal class.
# Skip percent calculations if the baseline is zero, near zero, or crosses zero.

safe_pct <- function(est, lo, hi, base, base_lo, base_hi, eps = 1e-6) {
  if (
    length(base) == 0 ||
    anyNA(c(base, base_lo, base_hi)) ||
    abs(base) < eps ||
    base_lo <= 0 ||
    base_hi <= 0
  ) {
    return(list(pct = NA_real_, pcl = NA_real_, pcu = NA_real_))
  }

  list(
    pct = 100 * (est / base - 1),
    pcl = 100 * (lo / base - 1),
    pcu = 100 * (hi / base - 1)
  )
}

emm_pct <- emm_all %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Activity) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    base = dplyr::first(estimate[Condition == BASELINE]),
    base_lo = dplyr::first(conf.low[Condition == BASELINE]),
    base_hi = dplyr::first(conf.high[Condition == BASELINE]),
    tmp = purrr::pmap(
      list(estimate, conf.low, conf.high, base, base_lo, base_hi),
      safe_pct
    ),
    pct = purrr::map_dbl(tmp, "pct"),
    pcl = purrr::map_dbl(tmp, "pcl"),
    pcu = purrr::map_dbl(tmp, "pcu")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-tmp)


# Main outputs from this chunk
# emm_all:
#   95% EMM table by activity and hydrology class
# emm_all_tbl99:
#   99% EMM table by activity and hydrology class
# emm_pct:
#   95% percent difference from the Below Normal baseline
```

```{r standardizing}

# Build descriptive standardized summaries
# Start from the standardized activity table created earlier.
# Add a common year field for descriptive summaries over time.

all_activities_norm2 <- all_activities2_p_norm

if (!"SeasonYear" %in% names(all_activities_norm2)) {
  if ("Year" %in% names(all_activities_norm2)) {
    all_activities_norm2 <- all_activities_norm2 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(SeasonYear = as.numeric(Year))
  } else if ("year" %in% names(all_activities_norm2)) {
    all_activities_norm2 <- all_activities_norm2 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(SeasonYear = as.numeric(year))
  } else if ("Date" %in% names(all_activities_norm2)) {
    all_activities_norm2 <- all_activities_norm2 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(SeasonYear = lubridate::year(as.Date(Date)))
  } else {
    stop("Could not create `SeasonYear`: no usable date or year column found.")
  }
}

# Recompute z-scores within activity as a descriptive standardization step.
all_activities_norm2 <- all_activities_norm2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Activity) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Value_norm = as.numeric(scale(Value))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Summarize mean standardized values by hydrology class.
summarise_cond_means2 <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
      cond_idx = as.numeric(Condition)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Activity, Season, Condition, cond_idx) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      mean_val = mean(Value_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# Summarize mean standardized values by year.
summarise_time_means2 <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Activity, Season, SeasonYear) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      mean_val = mean(Value_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

cond_means2 <- summarise_cond_means2(all_activities_norm2)
time_means2 <- summarise_time_means2(all_activities_norm2)

# Main outputs from this chunk:
# cond_means2 = mean standardized activity values by hydrology class
# time_means2 = mean standardized activity values by year
```


```{r significance per activity and conditions}

# Activity × Condition (strict star rule: p < .01)
# Canonical levels + ordering
COND_LEVELS <- c("Critical", "Dry", "Below Normal", "Above Normal", "Wet")
ACTIVITY_ORDER <- c("Boaters", "Day Users", "Birders", "Waterfowl Hunters")

# Helping knobs
STAR_COLOR <- "red4"
STAR_PAD_ACT <- 20
STAR_SIZE_ACT <- 9

Y_MIN <- -150
Y_MAX <- 200
USE_REPEL <- requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)

# Whiskers 
POINT_SIZE <- 12
POINT_STROKE <- 0.8
ERRBAR_LWD <- 0.6
ERRBAR_CAP <- 0.28
# Colored boxes (changed to circles 22 ->21 ggplotly2)
POINT_SIZE <- 7.5
POINT_SHAPE <- 21
POINT_STROKE <- 0.6

# Typography for quarter-page legibility
TITLE_SIZE <- 18
SUBTITLE_SIZE <- 11
STRIP_SIZE <- 20
AXIS_SIZE <- 14
AXIS_TITLE_SIZE <- 14
LEGEND_SIZE <- 12
LEGEND_TITLE_SIZE <- 13
CAPTION_SIZE <- 10

# Robust emmeans wrapper 
safe_emm <- function(model, specs, weights = EMM_WEIGHTS_GLOBAL, at = list()) {
  if (ROBUST_SE) {
    if (!requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly = TRUE)) {
      stop("Please install 'sandwich' (or set ROBUST_SE <- FALSE).")
    }

    vc <- vcovHC_psd(model, type = HC_TYPE)
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs, weights = weights, at = at, vcov. = vc)
  } else {
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs, weights = weights, at = at)
  }
}

# Helpers: pooled FE EMMs, 'eff' contrasts',  % vs across-class average
emm_pct_vs_avg_raw <- function(dat, response, site_var, at = list()) {
  y_sym <- rlang::ensym(response)
  site_sym <- rlang::ensym(site_var)
  site_nm <- rlang::as_name(site_sym)

  dat2 <- dat %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(!!y_sym), !is.na(Condition), !is.na(!!site_sym)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS) |> forcats::fct_drop(),
      !!site_sym := forcats::fct_drop(as.factor(!!site_sym))
    ) %>%
    droplevels()

  if (length(levels(dat2$Condition)) < 2L || nrow(dat2) < 2L) {
    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        Condition = factor(COND_LEVELS, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
        diff = NA_real_,
        lcl = NA_real_,
        ucl = NA_real_,
        p_bh = NA_real_,
        pct = NA_real_,
        pcl = NA_real_,
        pcu = NA_real_
      ) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(Condition)
    )
  }

  n_sites <- nlevels(dat2[[site_nm]])
  has_closed <- "Closed" %in% names(dat2) || ("Closed" %in% names(at))

  rhs <- "Condition"
  if (n_sites >= 2L) {
    rhs <- paste0(rhs, " + factor(`", site_nm, "`)")
  }
  if (has_closed) {
    rhs <- paste0(rhs, " + Closed")
  }

  fml <- stats::as.formula(paste0(rlang::as_name(y_sym), " ~ ", rhs))

  try_fit <- function(formula) {
    tryCatch(
      stats::lm(formula, data = dat2),
      error = function(e) {
        if (grepl("contrasts.*2 or more levels", e$message)) {
          NULL
        } else {
          stop(e)
        }
      }
    )
  }

  mod <- try_fit(fml)

  if (is.null(mod)) {
    fml2 <- stats::as.formula(
      paste0(
        rlang::as_name(y_sym),
        " ~ Condition",
        if (has_closed) " + Closed" else ""
      )
    )
    mod <- try_fit(fml2)
  }

  if (is.null(mod)) {
    mod <- stats::lm(
      stats::as.formula(paste0(rlang::as_name(y_sym), " ~ Condition")),
      data = dat2
    )
  }

  em <- safe_emm(mod, ~ Condition, weights = EMM_WEIGHTS_GLOBAL, at = at)
  eff <- emmeans::contrast(em, "eff", adjust = "BH")
  seff <- summary(eff, infer = TRUE)
  sem <- summary(em)

  lcl <- if ("lower.CL" %in% names(seff)) seff$lower.CL else seff$asymp.LCL
  ucl <- if ("upper.CL" %in% names(seff)) seff$upper.CL else seff$asymp.UCL
  grid <- as.data.frame(em)

  stopifnot(nrow(grid) == nrow(seff))

  gm <- mean(sem$emmean, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(gm) || gm == 0) {
    gm <- NA_real_
  }

  tibble::tibble(
    Condition = factor(grid$Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
    diff = seff$estimate,
    lcl = lcl,
    ucl = ucl,
    p_bh = seff$p.value,
    pct = 100 * diff / gm,
    pcl = 100 * lcl / gm,
    pcu = 100 * ucl / gm
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(Condition)
}

# Build activity tables 
boat_tbl <- all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Activity == "Boaters", Season == "Summer") %>%
  emm_pct_vs_avg_raw(response = Value, site_var = Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Boaters", Season = "Summer")

day_tbl <- all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Activity == "Day Users", Season == "Summer") %>%
  emm_pct_vs_avg_raw(response = Value, site_var = Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Day Users", Season = "Summer")

bird_tbl <- all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Activity == "Birders", Season == "Winter") %>%
  emm_pct_vs_avg_raw(response = Value, site_var = Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Birders", Season = "Winter")

wf_tbl <- waterfowl_clean2 %>%
  emm_pct_vs_avg_raw(response = Waterfowl, site_var = Unit, at = list(Closed = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Waterfowl Hunters", Season = "Winter")

sig_pct_tables <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  boat_tbl,
  day_tbl,
  bird_tbl,
  wf_tbl
) %>%
  dplyr::select(Activity, Season, Condition, pct, pcl, pcu, p_bh) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = factor(Activity, levels = ACTIVITY_ORDER),
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Activity, Season, Condition)

# Plot labels and panels 
cond_pal <- c(
  "Critical" = "red4",
  "Dry" = "red1",
  "Below Normal" = "lightcoral",
  "Above Normal" = "deepskyblue1",
  "Wet" = "dodgerblue4"
)

panel_levels <- c(
  "e) Boaters",
  "f) Day use",
  "g) Birding",
  "h) Waterfowl"
)

sig_plot_df <- sig_pct_tables %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    star = ifelse(!is.na(p_bh) & p_bh < 0.01, "*", ""),
    pad = STAR_PAD_ACT,
    y_star_raw = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(pct) & pct >= 0, pcu + pad, pcl - pad),
    y_star = pmin(pmax(y_star_raw, Y_MIN + 2), Y_MAX - 2),
    panel = dplyr::case_when(
      Activity == "Boaters" ~ "e) Boaters",
      Activity == "Day Users" ~ "f) Day use",
      Activity == "Birders" ~ "g) Birding",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" ~ "h) Waterfowl",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    panel = factor(panel, levels = panel_levels)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(panel))

labels_layers <-
  if (USE_REPEL) {
    list(
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data = dplyr::filter(sig_plot_df, star != ""),
        aes(y = y_star, label = star),
        colour = STAR_COLOR,
        direction = "y",
        box.padding = 0.18,
        point.padding = 0.20,
        min.segment.length = 0,
        segment.color = NA,
        seed = 123,
        max.overlaps = Inf,
        na.rm = TRUE,
        size = STAR_SIZE_ACT,
        fontface = "bold",
        show.legend = FALSE
      )
    )
  } else {
    list(
      ggplot2::geom_text(
        data = dplyr::filter(sig_plot_df, star != ""),
        aes(y = y_star, label = star),
        colour = STAR_COLOR,
        vjust = -0.15,
        na.rm = TRUE,
        size = STAR_SIZE_ACT,
        fontface = "bold",
        show.legend = FALSE
      )
    )
  }

SUBTITLE_TEXT <- NULL
STARS_NOTE_STRICT <- NULL
FONT_FAM <- "sans"

p_act <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  sig_plot_df,
  ggplot2::aes(x = Condition, y = pct)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    colour = "grey55"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = pcl, ymax = pcu),
    width = ERRBAR_CAP,
    linewidth = ERRBAR_LWD,
    colour = "black",
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    ggplot2::aes(fill = Condition),
    shape = POINT_SHAPE,
    size = POINT_SIZE,
    stroke = POINT_STROKE,
    colour = "black",
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  labels_layers +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = cond_pal,
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "Hydrology class"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(Y_MIN, Y_MAX),
    breaks = seq(Y_MIN, Y_MAX, by = 50),
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.08))
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, drop = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "% difference from across-class average",
    subtitle = SUBTITLE_TEXT,
    x = NULL,
    y = "% difference vs class-average",
    caption = STARS_NOTE_STRICT
  ) +
ggplot2::theme(
  panel.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),
  plot.background  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
  strip.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),

  panel.grid.minor.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
  panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
  panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_line(
    linewidth = 0.35,
    colour = "grey80"
  ),

    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = STRIP_SIZE,
      family = FONT_FAM,
      colour = "gray15"
    ),

  axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
    angle = 30,
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1,
    size = AXIS_SIZE + 1, 
    family = FONT_FAM,
    colour = "gray20"
  ),

  axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
    size = AXIS_SIZE + 1,
    family = FONT_FAM,
    colour = "gray20"
  ),

  axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(
    size = AXIS_TITLE_SIZE + 1,
    family = FONT_FAM,
    colour = "gray20"
  ),

  plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
    hjust = 0.5,
    face = "bold",
    size = TITLE_SIZE + 1,
    family = FONT_FAM
  ),

  legend.position = "right",

  panel.spacing = grid::unit(14, "pt"),
  plot.margin = grid::unit(c(18, 18, 18, 18), "pt")
)

geom_segment(
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(Condition) - 0.5,
    xend = as.numeric(Condition) + 0.5,
    y = pct,
    yend = pct
  ),
  linewidth = 1.4,
  colour = "black"
)
geom_point(
  aes(fill = Condition),
  shape = 22,
  size = POINT_SIZE,
  stroke = POINT_STROKE,
  colour = "black"
)

# Plot Figure 3 (e-h)
p_act

ggsave(
  "sig_activity_conditions.pdf",
  p_act,
  width = 8.5,
  height = 5.75,
  device = cairo_pdf,
  dpi = 600
)
```


```{r statistics table}

# Activity order
ACTIVITY_ORDER <- c("Boaters", "Day Users", "Birders", "Waterfowl Hunters")

stats_table <- sig_pct_tables %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = factor(Activity, levels = ACTIVITY_ORDER)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Activity, Condition) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Estimate = paste0(
      sprintf("%.1f", pct), "%", 
      ifelse(!is.na(p_bh) & p_bh < 0.01, " *", "")
    ),
    Range = paste0(
      sprintf("%.1f", pcl), "%, ",
      sprintf("%.1f", pcu), "%"
    ),
    Activity = dplyr::case_when(
      Activity == "Day Users" ~ "Day use",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" ~ "Waterfowl",
      Activity == "Birders" ~ "Birding",
      TRUE ~ as.character(Activity)
    ),
    p_bh = round(p_bh, 4)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Activity,
    Season,
    Condition,
    Estimate,
    Range,
    p_bh
  )

stats_table
```


#-----------------SUPPLEMENTARY----------------------

```{r activity averages by site}

# Activity averages by site
ACTIVITY_ORDER <- c("Boaters", "Day Users", "Birders", "Waterfowl Hunters")

gi_subunits <- c(
  "Gold Hills",
  "Goodyear Slough",
  "Island Slough",
  "Joice Island",
  "West Family Jr."
)

wf_gi <- waterfowl_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    UnitGroup = dplyr::case_when(
      Unit %in% gi_subunits ~
        "Grizzly Island subunits (combined)",

      Unit == "Grizzly Island" ~
        "Grizzly Island Wildlife Area",

      Unit == "Twitchell" ~
        "Twitchell Island",

      Unit == "Yolo" ~
        "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area",

      TRUE ~ Unit
    )
  )

site_activity_avgs <- all_activities2_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Activity), !is.na(Season), !is.na(Location), !is.na(Value)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Location = as.character(Location),
    Location = stringr::str_squish(Location),

# combining selected Grizzly Island subunits for Waterfowl
    Location = dplyr::case_when(
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" & Location %in% gi_subunits ~ "Grizzly Island subunits (combined)",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" & Location == "Grizzly Island" ~ "Grizzly Island Wildlife Area",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" & Location == "Twitchell" ~ "Twitchell Island",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" & Location == "Yolo" ~ "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area",

# naming for Birding
      Activity == "Birders" & Location == "Yolo Bypass" ~ "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area",
      Activity == "Birders" & Location == "Woodbridge" ~ "Woodbridge Ecological Reserve",
      Activity == "Birders" & Location == "Sherman Island" ~ "Lower Sherman Island Wildlife Area",
      Activity == "Birders" & Location == "Cosumnes" ~ "Cosumnes River Preserve",

      TRUE ~ Location
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Activity, Season, Location) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_obs = dplyr::n(),
    mean_value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_value = stats::sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = factor(Activity, levels = ACTIVITY_ORDER),
    Activity = dplyr::case_when(
      Activity == "Day Users" ~ "Day use",
      Activity == "Waterfowl Hunters" ~ "Waterfowl",
      Activity == "Birders" ~ "Birding",
      TRUE ~ as.character(Activity)
    ),
    mean_value = round(mean_value, 1),
    sd_value = round(sd_value, 1)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Activity, Season, Location)

site_activity_avgs
```

```{r site by activity hydrology plots}
# Same logic as the activity-level significance plot,
# but one level deeper: hydrology-class effects within each site

# Canonical hydrology order and significance threshold
COND_LEVELS <- c("Critical", "Dry", "Below Normal", "Above Normal", "Wet")
STAR_P_THRESH <- 0.01


# Shared plot styling knobs
STAR_COLOR <- "red4"
STAR_SIZE <- 8
STAR_PAD <- 10

Y_MIN_SUMMER <- -150
Y_MAX_SUMMER <- 250
Y_MIN_WINTER <- -75
Y_MAX_WINTER <- 75

ERRBAR_LWD <- 0.6
ERRBAR_CAP <- 0.18

POINT_SHAPE <- 21
POINT_SIZE <- 6.8
POINT_STROKE <- 0.7

TITLE_SIZE <- 16
STRIP_SIZE <- 12
AXIS_SIZE <- 12
AXIS_TITLE_SIZE <- 13

cond_pal <- c(
  "Critical" = "red4",
  "Dry" = "red1",
  "Below Normal" = "lightcoral",
  "Above Normal" = "deepskyblue1",
  "Wet" = "dodgerblue4"
)


# Helper: complete Site × Condition grid
# This keeps empty hydrology classes visible in the facet structure.
complete_site_condition <- function(df, site_col = "Site") {
  site_sym <- rlang::sym(site_col)

  site_levels <- df %>%
    dplyr::distinct(!!site_sym) %>%
    dplyr::pull(!!site_sym) %>%
    as.character()

  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!site_sym := as.character(!!site_sym),
      Condition = as.character(Condition)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      !!site_sym := site_levels,
      Condition = COND_LEVELS
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!site_sym := factor(.data[[site_col]], levels = site_levels),
      Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
    )
}


# Helper: mute selected Site × Condition combinations
# We keep the row/facet structure, but remove the plotted values.
mute_pairs <- function(df, pairs, site_col = "Site") {
  site_sym <- rlang::sym(site_col)

  df %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      pairs %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          !!site_sym := stringr::str_squish(as.character(!!site_sym)),
          Condition = as.character(Condition),
          .mute = TRUE
        ),
      by = c(site_col, "Condition")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(
        c(diff, lcl, ucl, p_bh, pct, pcl, pcu),
        ~ dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, .x)
      ),
      star = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), "", dplyr::coalesce(star, ""))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-.mute)
}


# Helper: cap plotted percent values and CIs to panel limits
# This prevents the giant vertical spikes when CIs go beyond plot bounds.
cap_pct_bounds <- function(df, lower, upper, pad = 2) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      pct_cap = pmax(pmin(pct, upper), lower),
      pcl_cap = pmax(pcl, lower),
      pcu_cap = pmin(pcu, upper),
      y_star = dplyr::if_else(
        !is.na(pct_cap) & pct_cap >= 0,
        pmin(pcu_cap + pad, upper - pad),
        pmax(pcl_cap - pad, lower + pad)
      )
    )
}


# Per site effects
site_eff_pct <- function(dat, response, site_var, at = list()) {
  y_sym    <- rlang::ensym(response)
  site_sym <- rlang::ensym(site_var)
  site_nm  <- rlang::as_name(site_sym)

  dat2 <- dat %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(!!y_sym), !is.na(Condition), !is.na(!!site_sym)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!y_sym    := as.numeric(!!y_sym),
      Condition  = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS) |> forcats::fct_drop(),
      !!site_sym := forcats::fct_drop(as.factor(!!site_sym))
    ) %>%
    droplevels()

  sites_all <- levels(dat2[[site_nm]])
  if (is.null(sites_all)) {
    sites_all <- unique(as.character(dat2[[site_nm]]))
  }

# Require at least 2 hydrology classes per site
  ok_sites <- dat2 %>%
    dplyr::distinct(!!site_sym, Condition) %>%
    dplyr::count(!!site_sym, name = "k") %>%
    dplyr::filter(k >= 2L)

  dat_ok <- dplyr::semi_join(dat2, ok_sites, by = site_nm)

# If nothing survives, return a full empty grid so facets still render cleanly
  if (nrow(dat_ok) == 0L || nlevels(dat_ok$Condition) < 2L) {
    return(
      tidyr::expand_grid(
        Site = factor(sites_all, levels = sites_all),
        Condition = factor(COND_LEVELS, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
      ) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          diff = NA_real_,
          lcl  = NA_real_,
          ucl  = NA_real_,
          p_bh = NA_real_,
          star = "",
          pct  = NA_real_,
          pcl  = NA_real_,
          pcu  = NA_real_
        ) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(Site, Condition)
    )
  }

# Keep Closed only if it is actually present and varies
  has_closed_valid <-
  "Closed" %in% names(dat_ok) &&
  length(unique(stats::na.omit(dat_ok$Closed))) > 1
  if (!has_closed_valid && "Closed" %in% names(dat_ok)) {
    dat_ok <- dplyr::select(dat_ok, -Closed)
  }
  has_closed_in_model <- "Closed" %in% names(dat_ok)

  n_sites_ok <- nlevels(dat_ok[[site_nm]])


# Interactions
  rhs1 <- if (n_sites_ok >= 2L) paste0("Condition * `", site_nm, "`") else "Condition"
  if (has_closed_in_model) rhs1 <- paste0(rhs1, " + Closed")
  fml1 <- stats::as.formula(paste0(rlang::as_name(y_sym), " ~ ", rhs1))

  rhs2 <- if (n_sites_ok >= 2L) paste0("Condition + `", site_nm, "`") else "Condition"
  if (has_closed_in_model) rhs2 <- paste0(rhs2, " + Closed")
  fml2 <- stats::as.formula(paste0(rlang::as_name(y_sym), " ~ ", rhs2))

  fml3 <- stats::as.formula(
    paste0(rlang::as_name(y_sym), " ~ Condition", if (has_closed_in_model) " + Closed" else "")
  )

  try_fit <- function(fml) {
    tryCatch(stats::lm(fml, data = dat_ok), error = function(e) NULL)
  }

  mod <- try_fit(fml1)
  if (is.null(mod)) mod <- try_fit(fml2)
  if (is.null(mod)) mod <- try_fit(fml3)

# If all fits fail, return full empty grid
  if (is.null(mod)) {
    return(
      tidyr::expand_grid(
        Site = factor(sites_all, levels = sites_all),
        Condition = factor(COND_LEVELS, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
      ) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          diff = NA_real_,
          lcl  = NA_real_,
          ucl  = NA_real_,
          p_bh = NA_real_,
          star = "",
          pct  = NA_real_,
          pcl  = NA_real_,
          pcu  = NA_real_
        ) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(Site, Condition)
    )
  }

# Only condition on site in emmeans if the fitted model actually includes site
  has_site_in_model <- grepl(
    paste0("\\b`?", site_nm, "`?\\b"),
    paste(deparse(stats::formula(mod)), collapse = " ")
  )

  specs <- if (has_site_in_model) {
    stats::as.formula(paste0("~ Condition | `", site_nm, "`"))
  } else {
    ~ Condition
  }

  em  <- safe_emm(mod, specs = specs, at = at)
  eff <- emmeans::contrast(em, "eff", adjust = "BH")

  seff <- summary(eff, infer = TRUE, level = 0.95) %>% tibble::as_tibble()
  grid <- as.data.frame(em) %>% tibble::as_tibble()

  lcl_col <- if ("lower.CL" %in% names(seff)) "lower.CL" else "asymp.LCL"
  ucl_col <- if ("upper.CL" %in% names(seff)) "upper.CL" else "asymp.UCL"

# If site conditioning dropped out, return pooled rows
  if (!(site_nm %in% names(grid))) {
    gm <- mean(grid$emmean, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.finite(gm) || gm == 0) gm <- NA_real_

    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        Site = factor("(pooled)", levels = "(pooled)"),
        Condition = factor(grid$Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
        diff = seff$estimate,
        lcl  = seff[[lcl_col]],
        ucl  = seff[[ucl_col]],
        p_bh = seff$p.value,
        star = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(seff$p.value) & seff$p.value < STAR_P_THRESH, "*", ""),
        pct  = 100 * diff / gm,
        pcl  = 100 * lcl  / gm,
        pcu  = 100 * ucl  / gm
      )
    )
  }

# Site-specific across-class mean
  gm_tbl <- grid %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[site_nm]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(gm = mean(emmean, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Stable row matching within each site
  grid2 <- grid %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[site_nm]], Condition) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[site_nm]]) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(row_id = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(site_nm), row_id, Condition)

  seff2 <- seff %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[site_nm]]) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(row_id = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      lcl = .data[[lcl_col]],
      ucl = .data[[ucl_col]]
    )

  out_ok <- seff2 %>%
    dplyr::left_join(grid2, by = c(site_nm, "row_id")) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(gm_tbl, by = site_nm) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Site = .data[[site_nm]],
      Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
      diff = estimate,
      lcl  = lcl,
      ucl  = ucl,
      p_bh = p.value,
      star = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(p_bh) & p_bh < STAR_P_THRESH, "*", ""),
      pct  = 100 * diff / gm,
      pcl  = 100 * lcl / gm,
      pcu  = 100 * ucl / gm
    )

# Fill dropped sites so facet structure stays stable
  sites_bad <- setdiff(sites_all, unique(as.character(out_ok$Site)))

  filler <- if (length(sites_bad)) {
    tidyr::expand_grid(
      Site = factor(sites_bad, levels = sites_all),
      Condition = factor(COND_LEVELS, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        diff = NA_real_,
        lcl  = NA_real_,
        ucl  = NA_real_,
        p_bh = NA_real_,
        star = "",
        pct  = NA_real_,
        pcl  = NA_real_,
        pcu  = NA_real_
      )
  } else {
    tibble::tibble(
      Site = factor(character(), levels = sites_all),
      Condition = factor(character(), levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE),
      diff = double(),
      lcl  = double(),
      ucl  = double(),
      p_bh = double(),
      star = character(),
      pct  = double(),
      pcl  = double(),
      pcu  = double()
    )
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out_ok, filler) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Site = factor(Site, levels = sites_all),
      Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(Site, Condition)
}


# Build activity-specific datasets from the current recreation workflow
# ==========================================================
# Compute site-level significance tables
# ==========================================================
dat_boat <- all_activities2_p %>%
  filter(
    Activity == "Boaters",
    Season == "Summer"
  )

dat_day <- all_activities2_p %>%
  filter(
    Activity == "Day Users",
    Season == "Summer"
  )

dat_bird <- all_activities2_p %>%
  filter(
    Activity == "Birders",
    Season == "Winter"
  )


boat_site_tbl <- site_eff_pct(dat_boat, Value, Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Boaters")

day_site_tbl <- site_eff_pct(dat_day, Value, Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Day use")

bird_site_tbl <- site_eff_pct(dat_bird, Value, Location) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Birding")

wf_site_tbl <- site_eff_pct(
  wf_gi,
  Waterfowl,
  UnitGroup,
  at = list(Closed = 0)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Waterfowl")


# ==========================================================
# Suppress Site × Condition cells that contain only zeros
#
# These cells contain observations but no information for
# inference (mean = 0 and sd = 0). We keep the facet/grid
# structure but remove estimates, CIs, stars and p-values.
# ==========================================================

boat_zero_cells <- dat_boat %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Location, Condition) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_val = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_val   = stats::sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    mean_val == 0,
    dplyr::coalesce(sd_val, 0) == 0
  ) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Site = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Location)),
    Condition = as.character(Condition)
  )

boat_site_tbl <- boat_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Site)),
    Condition = as.character(Condition)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    boat_zero_cells %>%
      dplyr::mutate(.mute = TRUE),
    by = c("Site", "Condition")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, diff),
    lcl  = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, lcl),
    ucl  = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, ucl),
    p_bh = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, p_bh),
    pct  = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, pct),
    pcl  = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, pcl),
    pcu  = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), NA_real_, pcu),
    star = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(.mute), "", star)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-.mute)

boat_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    Site %in% c(
      "Delta Meadows",
      "Franks Tract SRA"
    ),
    Condition %in% c(
      "Critical",
      "Dry"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Site,
    Condition,
    pct,
    p_bh
  )
# place boating suppression logic on sites with no activity data

boat_order <- c(
  "Franks Tract SRA",
  "Brannan Island SRA",
  "Delta Meadows",
  "Bethany Reservoir SRA"
)

boat_site_tbl <- boat_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Site)),
    Condition = as.character(Condition)
  ) %>%
  complete_site_condition(site_col = "Site") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = forcats::fct_relevel(factor(Site), boat_order),
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = COND_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE)
  )


# Add facet labels
boat_site_tbl <- boat_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Facet = factor(
      dplyr::recode(
        as.character(Site),
        "Franks Tract SRA" = "Franks Tract SRA",
        "Brannan Island SRA" = "Brannan Island SRA",
        "Delta Meadows" = "Delta Meadows",
        "Bethany Reservoir SRA" = "Bethany Reservoir SRA"
      ),
      levels = c(
        "Franks Tract SRA",
        "Brannan Island SRA",
        "Delta Meadows",
        "Bethany Reservoir SRA"
      )
    )
  )

day_site_tbl <- day_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Facet = factor(
      dplyr::recode(
        as.character(Site),
        "Brannan Island SRA" = "Brannan Island SRA",
        "Delta Meadows" = "Delta Meadows",
        "Old Sacramento SHP" = "Old Sacramento SHP",
        "Benicia SRA" = "Benicia SRA",
        "Bethany Reservoir SRA" = "Bethany Reservoir SRA",
        "Caswell Memorial SP" = "Caswell Memorial SP"
      ),
      levels = c(
        "Brannan Island SRA",
        "Delta Meadows",
        "Old Sacramento SHP",
        "Benicia SRA",
        "Bethany Reservoir SRA",
        "Caswell Memorial SP"
      )
    )
  )

bird_site_tbl <- bird_site_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Facet = factor(
      dplyr::recode(
        as.character(Site),
        "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area" = "Yolo Bypass",
        "Woodbridge Ecological Reserve" = "Woodbridge",
        "Lower Sherman Island Wildlife Area" = "Sherman Island",
        "Cosumnes River Preserve" = "Cosumnes"
      ),
      levels = c(
        "Yolo Bypass",
        "Woodbridge",
        "Sherman Island",
        "Cosumnes"
      )
    )
  )

# Compute waterfowl site-level significance tables.
# Twitchell is estimated separately because it has valid observations but
# is missing Above Normal, which can make the pooled interaction model
# return non-estimable rows for that unit.
wf_gi_main <- wf_gi |>
  dplyr::filter(UnitGroup != "Twitchell Island")

wf_gi_twitchell <- wf_gi |>
  dplyr::filter(UnitGroup == "Twitchell Island")

wf_site_tbl_main <- site_eff_pct(
  wf_gi_main,
  Waterfowl,
  UnitGroup,
  at = list(Closed = 0)
)

wf_site_tbl_twitchell <- site_eff_pct(
  wf_gi_twitchell,
  Waterfowl,
  UnitGroup,
  at = list(Closed = 0)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = "Twitchell Island"
  )

wf_site_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  wf_site_tbl_main,
  wf_site_tbl_twitchell
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = "Waterfowl",
    Site = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Site)),
    Condition = as.character(Condition)
  ) |>
  complete_site_condition(site_col = "Site") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Facet = dplyr::case_when(
      Site == "Yolo Bypass Wildlife Area" ~ "Yolo Bypass",
      Site == "Grizzly Island Wildlife Area" ~ "Grizzly Island",
      Site == "Twitchell Island" ~ "Twitchell Island",
      Site == "Grizzly Island subunits (combined)" ~ "Grizzly subunits",
      TRUE ~ as.character(Site)
    ),
    Facet = factor(
      Facet,
      levels = c(
        "Yolo Bypass",
        "Grizzly Island",
        "Twitchell Island",
        "Grizzly subunits"
      )
    ),
    Condition = factor(
      Condition,
      levels = COND_LEVELS,
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )
# Plot helper
plot_site_activity <- function(
    tbl,
    title,
    ylab,
    ylim,
    drop_levels = NULL
) {

  tbl2 <- tbl

  # Optionally suppress selected hydrology classes from plotting.
  if (!is.null(drop_levels)) {
    tbl2 <- tbl2 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        dplyr::across(
          c(pct, pcl, pcu),
          ~ dplyr::if_else(
            as.character(Condition) %in% drop_levels,
            NA_real_,
            .x
          )
        ),
        star = dplyr::if_else(
          as.character(Condition) %in% drop_levels,
          "",
          star
        )
      )
  }

  # Cap plotted values to panel bounds before drawing.
  tbl2 <- cap_pct_bounds(
    tbl2,
    lower = ylim[1],
    upper = ylim[2],
    pad = 10
  )

  ggplot2::ggplot(
    tbl2,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = Condition,
      y = pct_cap
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0,
      linewidth = 0.4,
      colour = "grey55"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
      ggplot2::aes(
        ymin = pcl_cap,
        ymax = pcu_cap
      ),
      width = ERRBAR_CAP,
      linewidth = ERRBAR_LWD,
      colour = "black",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      ggplot2::aes(fill = Condition),
      shape = POINT_SHAPE,
      size = POINT_SIZE,
      stroke = POINT_STROKE,
      colour = "black",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = dplyr::filter(tbl2, star != ""),
      ggplot2::aes(
        y = y_star,
        label = star
      ),
      colour = STAR_COLOR,
      size = STAR_SIZE,
      fontface = "bold",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = cond_pal,
      drop = FALSE,
      name = "Hydrology class"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      limits = ylim,
      breaks = seq(ylim[1], ylim[2], by = 25)
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ Facet, ncol = 2) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      x = NULL,
      y = ylab
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_line(
        linewidth = 0.3,
        colour = "grey85"
      ),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(
        face = "bold",
        size = STRIP_SIZE,
        colour = "gray15",
        margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 4)
      ),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
        angle = 30,
        hjust = 1,
        size = AXIS_SIZE,
        colour = "gray20"
      ),
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
        size = AXIS_SIZE,
        colour = "gray20"
      ),
      axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(
        size = AXIS_TITLE_SIZE,
        colour = "gray20"
      ),
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
        hjust = 0.5,
        face = "bold",
        size = TITLE_SIZE
      ),
      plot.margin = grid::unit(
        c(18, 24, 18, 24),
        "pt"
      ),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
}

# Build plots
p_site_boat <- plot_site_activity(
  boat_site_tbl,
  title = "Boaters (Summer): % difference vs site across-class average",
  ylab = "% difference vs site average",
  ylim = c(-125, 225)
)

p_site_day <- plot_site_activity(
  day_site_tbl,
  title = "Day use (Summer): % difference vs site across-class average",
  ylab = "% difference vs site average",
  ylim = c(-100, 150)
)

p_site_bird <- plot_site_activity(
  bird_site_tbl,
  title = "Birding (Winter): % difference vs site across-class average",
  ylab = "% difference vs site average",
  ylim = c(Y_MIN_WINTER, Y_MAX_WINTER)
)

p_site_wf <- plot_site_activity(
  wf_site_tbl,
  title = "Waterfowl (Winter): % difference vs site across-class average",
  ylab = "% difference vs unit average",
  ylim = c(Y_MIN_WINTER, Y_MAX_WINTER)
)

# Print plots
p_site_boat
p_site_day
p_site_bird
p_site_wf

boat_site_tbl %>%
  filter(
    Site %in% c(
      "Delta Meadows",
      "Franks Tract SRA"
    ),
    Condition %in% c(
      "Critical",
      "Dry"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Site,
    Condition,
    pct,
    p_bh
  )


```


```{r site statistics table}

# =========================
# Site-level formatted statistics table
# Same format as the activity table,
# but includes Site because results are nested within activity
# =========================

site_stats_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  boat_site_tbl %>% dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Boaters", Season = "Summer"),
  day_site_tbl  %>% dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Day use", Season = "Summer"),
  bird_site_tbl %>% dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Birding", Season = "Winter"),
  wf_site_tbl   %>% dplyr::mutate(Activity = "Waterfowl", Season = "Winter")
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Site), !is.na(Condition)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity = factor(
      Activity,
      levels = c("Boaters", "Day use", "Birding", "Waterfowl")
    ),
    Condition = factor(
      Condition,
      levels = COND_LEVELS,
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    # Format estimate and attach star for BH-adjusted p < 0.01.
    Estimate = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(pct),
      "—",
      paste0(
        sprintf("%.1f", pct),
        "%",
        dplyr::if_else(!is.na(p_bh) & p_bh < 0.01, " *", "")
      )
    ),

    # Format 95% CI range.
    Range = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(pcl) | is.na(pcu),
      "—",
      paste0(
        sprintf("%.1f", pcl),
        "%, ",
        sprintf("%.1f", pcu),
        "%"
      )
    ),

    # Make p-values table-friendly.
p_bh = dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p_bh) ~ "—",
  p_bh < 0.0001 ~ "<0.0001",
  TRUE ~ sprintf("%.4f", p_bh)
)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Activity,
    Season,
    Site,
    Condition,
    Estimate,
    Range,
    p_bh
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Activity, Season, Site, Condition)

site_stats_table

site_stats_table %>%
  filter(p_bh == "0.0000")

```



```{r final audit}
# =========================
# RECREATION MODEL AUDIT
# =========================

audit_model <- function(mod, label) {
  tibble::tibble(
    Model = label,
    n = stats::nobs(mod),
    R2 = summary(mod)$r.squared,
    Adj_R2 = summary(mod)$adj.r.squared,
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(residuals(mod)^2)),
    Max_Leverage = max(hatvalues(mod)),
    Max_CooksD = max(cooks.distance(mod)),
    Influential_Points = sum(
      cooks.distance(mod) > 4 / stats::nobs(mod)
    )
  )
}

recreation_audit <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  audit_model(m_boat, "Boaters"),
  audit_model(m_day, "Day use"),
  audit_model(m_bird, "Birding"),
  audit_model(m_wf, "Waterfowl")
)

recreation_audit

```
